description: Human-readable source catalog for A-share industry ETF pools. The materializer converts this catalog into standard node, pool, asset, edge, layer, and report config files.

node_templates.description: Direct ETF share, AUM, or estimated net-flow evidence for the sector.
Structured policy or regulatory news affecting expectations for the sector.
Sector performance relative to broad A-shares or CSI 300.
Sector-specific proxy for earnings, supply-demand, orders, inventory, or policy transmission.

sectors.name: Brokerage
sectors.description: Brokerage ETFs are sensitive to market turnover, margin financing, IPO and refinancing policy, and expectations for a stronger equity cycle.

sectors.name: Bank and Insurance
sectors.description: Bank and insurance ETFs are credit-cycle and balance-sheet-sensitive financial pools.

sectors.name: Semiconductor
sectors.description: Semiconductor ETFs combine AI demand, localization, equipment cycles, and policy sensitivity.

sectors.name: AI and Computer
sectors.description: AI and computer ETFs depend on AI infrastructure spending, software demand, policy procurement, and growth-stock liquidity.

sectors.name: Communication and Electronics
sectors.description: Communication and electronics ETFs sit between AI hardware, consumer electronics, telecom infrastructure, and export demand.

sectors.name: New Energy Vehicle
sectors.description: New energy vehicle ETFs are driven by vehicle sales, battery prices, lithium cycle, inventory, and capacity discipline.

sectors.name: Healthcare and Pharma
sectors.description: Healthcare and pharma ETFs are policy-sensitive but can re-rate when innovation, overseas licensing, or payment expectations improve.

sectors.name: Consumer
sectors.description: Consumer ETFs depend on household income, retail sales, pricing power, inventory, and confidence.

sectors.name: Defense and Military
sectors.description: Defense ETFs are influenced by orders, fiscal defense spending, geopolitics, and state-owned asset restructuring expectations.

sectors.name: Resources and Materials
sectors.description: Resources and materials ETFs are driven by commodity prices, dollar pressure, inventory, supply discipline, and global manufacturing conditions.

sectors.name: Real Estate and Infrastructure
sectors.display_name: A-share Real Estate and Infrastructure Pool
sectors.description: Real estate and infrastructure ETFs are credit, policy, and fiscal-cycle-sensitive pools.
